ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or project creator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Financial goal set for the campaign */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Total amount pledged by backers */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers who supported the campaign */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the campaign is launched */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for pledging */,
  "launched_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign ends */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign is staff picked */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign is highlighted */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the campaign */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the campaign */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the campaign is launched */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the campaign is launched */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the campaign */,
  "facebook_link" TEXT /* Facebook link for the campaign */,
  "twitter_link" TEXT /* Twitter link for the campaign */,
  "instagram_link" TEXT /* Instagram link for the campaign */,
  "staff_pick_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was picked as a staff pick */,
  "spotlight_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was spotlighted */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the campaign */,
  "local_pledged" INTEGER /* Pledged amount in the platform's default currency */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., one-time, recurring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., food, music, technology) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main category it belongs to */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the subcategory image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "backer_name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "pledged_amount" INTEGER /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign supported by the backer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the backer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the backer */,
  "backer_tier" TEXT /* Tier of the backer (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  "backer_rewards" TEXT /* Rewards the backer is eligible for */,
  "backer_status" TEXT /* Status of the backer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "user_profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "facebook_link" TEXT /* Facebook link for the user */,
  "twitter_link" TEXT /* Twitter link for the user */,
  "instagram_link" TEXT /* Instagram link for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign this update is for */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., status, milestone, news) */,
  "update_media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media (e.g., images, videos) associated with the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_updates_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_tags" (
  "campaign_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-tag relationship */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_tags_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward tier */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward tier */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward tier */,
  "reward_amount" INTEGER /* Amount required to unlock the reward tier */,
  "reward_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward available */,
  "reward_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the reward image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_rewards" (
  "campaign_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-reward relationship */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_rewards_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the backer who made the pledge */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the pledge was made to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_images_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
